expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: final quality pass preserves layering and executable wording
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the benchmark focus and ties it to Phase 6 requirements: "Benchmark focus: Final quality pass preserves layering and executable wording" and enumerates Phase 6 expectations including "Enforces final layering and executable wording" with the 6-level layering order and "Output must remain executable". It also explains it is "not verifiable" due to missing Phase 6 artifacts, but the focus itself is explicitly covered.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase6
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md frame the evaluation around Phase 6 contract/rubric and Phase 6 required artifacts (drafts/qa_plan_phase6_r<round>.md, context/quality_delta_<feature-id>.md). result.md: "Primary phase under test: Phase 6" and "Phase 6 contract alignment" followed by Phase 6-specific requirements (spawn manifest, required outputs, quality_delta sections).
